//exclude_note: Issue 055 — `server/` lives in its own tsconfig (server/tsconfig.json). Server tests under tests/server/ cross-import server source via relative paths; tsc happily compiles those imports through this project's resolver, even though server/* isn't in `include`. If you ever introduce a server-only @types package or a server-only lib option, move the server tests into the server tsconfig instead of widening `include` here.
